ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxon (e.g., Abies guatemalensis) */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the taxon (e.g., Plantae) */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the taxon (e.g., Pinophyta) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the taxon (e.g., Pinopsida) */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the taxon (e.g., Pinales) */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the taxon (e.g., Pinaceae) */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the taxon (e.g., Abies) */,
  "taxonomy_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank (e.g., species, genus) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes regarding the taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource record */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxon associated with the resource */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term describing the type of biological material (e.g., fruit, seeds) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of biological material (e.g., tissue, DNA, specimen) */,
  "quantity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource quantity (e.g., grams, milliliters, individuals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country (e.g., MX for Mexico) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the country (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource being recorded */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the resource was recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource collected or observed */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., field observation, laboratory analysis) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., research paper, database, personal observation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed (e.g., 'updated quantity', 'added new data entry') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the location is found */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., forest, grassland, wetland) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status record */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxon associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the conservation status */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the conservation status was assessed */,
  "assessor" TEXT /* Name of the assessor who evaluated the conservation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_status_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Name of the project lead or principal investigator */,
  "project_team" TEXT /* Names of team members involved in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_taxa" (
  "project_taxa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-taxon relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon being studied in the project */,
  "study_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study related to the taxon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_taxa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_taxa_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_taxa_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, conservationist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
